case_title: ALFREDO B. GOMEZ VS. SEAN PORTIER

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, ALFREDO B. AS TO DEFENDANT PORTIER, SEAN
